rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly identified and explained multiple internal contradictions and proposed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged key uncertainties but didn't consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope with minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors were introduced, and harmful patterns in the original text were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance gaps were noted, but not all changes were traced.
